channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Large white catering van parked outside / untaxed and clamped, 17th March
item.description:
Large van has been stationary for approx 5 months? Clamped in last 4 weeks but nothing is happening.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Jasper Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hawley Road, 17th March
item.description:
Terrible pot holes
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13, Hawley Crescent, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: LC66 not working, 17th March
item.description:
LC66 not working

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Carlton Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London

item.title: LC36 not working, 17th March
item.description:
LC36 not working
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park Crescent, Northumberland Heath, Greater London

item.title: Both beacons and post on central island not working, 17th March
item.description:
Both beacons and post on central island not working
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 157, Bexley Road, Northumberland Heath, Erith, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: LC82 both lights not working, 17th March
item.description:
LC82 both lights not working

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 245, Bexley Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Matress and other things dumped, 17th March
item.description:
Mattress dumped by back of sheds. been there for days.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bridge Gardens, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: N16, 17th March
item.description:
Sofa been dumped on pavement for a week now. has been reported many times. being told that it has been collected and it is still there now. Prams and wheelchairs cannot get around it and have to go into rd

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Aden Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car appears to have been abandoned, 17th March
item.description:
I noticed the vehicle approximately 7 days ago. It is a white Citroen Berlingo van registration LV69 HZF. The car has remained stationary. The front nearside tyre is punctured and going flat. I have not observed anyone approaching or leaving the vehicle. The car is taxed until October 26. The front number plate is missing.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Berwick Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken pavement causing serious trip hazards, 17th March
item.description:
The pavement along the strip of shops on Burnt Ash Lane (opposite King’s meadow park) has been broken and uneven for a long period, creating serious trip hazards for pedestrians. This area is busy with foot traffic, including older residents and families with children, and the current condition poses a clear risk of injury. It reflects poorly on the area and needs immediate attention. Please arrange for inspection and repair without delay.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 97 - 99, Burnt Ash Lane, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road surface raised, 17th March
item.description:
Road surface is raised causing significant impact to vehicles going past in the outside lane. I looks like it was repaired previously but was not done properly

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A20, St Mary Cray, Swanley
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Erith Road by civic office, 17th March
item.description:
Manhole cover is damaged causing noise and vibrations has sunk due too increase traffic been present issue for a few months getting worse over time
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Erith Road, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overloading bins, 17th March
item.description:
Outsiders using our communal bins and overloading with junk, refluxing, bedding, gardening etc. no space for residents of Fairchild House to through their own bins as overloaded
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Fanshaw Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 17th March
item.description:
You keep closing the issues without clearing the rubbish. Why?
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Evering Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken curb, 17th March
item.description:
Tonight I have fallen off the broken curb just after the zebra crossing at Surrey Quays shopping centre. Where the bus lane comes into the centre. I have potentially sprained/ broken my ankle.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lower Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trolley on the public garden, 17th March
item.description:
Trolley left on the public garden. It may contain whatever harmful for the kids playing in the square

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Battery Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping in the alleyway, 17th March
item.description:
Flytipping in the alleyway behind 195 Woolwich Road SE2 0PX. The Flytipping is rubble, building materials and household equipment. The tipping is stopping residents having access along the alleyway for skip or delivery Lorrie’s. Children play in the alleyway and are climbing on the pile of rubble which is dangerous.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Amberley Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement parking, 17th March
item.description:
People from new development are getting in the habit of parking in this bay and on pavement around it because lines and signage not yet in place. Better to deal with issue sooner than later!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Vauxhall Street, Oval, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Exposed ironwork on the single lane Alma Road, 17th March
item.description:
After the Thames Water burst water main incident there are roadworks and by house 157 on the single lane section, there is now exposed ironwork where the road has broken away. This is highly dangerous for motorists and motor cyclists. Please get this repaired urgently.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Alma Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking drive double yellow blips, 17th March
item.description:
Also as the road is narrow and this area is used for passing there is a traffic jam as no one can get by each other. This happens every night between 8-10pm
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kyverdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
